name: sgldev
description: Spencer Lyon's personal development tools. Includes 6 agents (5 code reviewers + 1 code health auditor), 11 skills, and 5 hooks that power a persistent per-agent expertise system — agents accumulate codebase-specific knowledge in .expertise/models/ across sessions via SessionStart, SubagentStart, SubagentStop, PostToolUse, and PreCompact hooks.
